input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7741 [Automation] native-image run fails for net.java.dev.jna:jna:5.19.0; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Tests that try to bind to a non-standard native library would need jna.library.path or LD_LIBRARY_PATH, but meaningful coverage is reachable with the standard C library already available on the CI host.
Avoid adding jna-platform just to access prebuilt mappings; it is a separate companion artifact and is not required to exercise net.java.dev.jna:jna itself.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: JNA is a standalone artifact with no Maven dependencies; its jnidispatch native libraries are bundled in the jar, and normal usage can exercise it by loading the host C library on Ubuntu without Docker, extra dependencies, or required system properties.
